items.title: Critical SimpleHelp flaw exploited to deploy new stealer malware
items.description: Hackers are exploiting a recently disclosed critical vulnerability (CVE-2026-48558) in SimpleHelp to deploy Djinn Stealer, a previously undocumented cross-platform information stealer targeting Windows, macOS, and Linux. [...]
items.apex_ai_summary: [CRITICAL] THREAT-INTEL advisory. Risk score 8.5/10. Full APEX AI analysis available to Pro subscribers.

title: SENTINEL APEX — Critical SimpleHelp flaw exploited to deploy new stealer malware

references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-48558
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/29
modified: 2026/06/29
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: critical
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-48558 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-29T21:42:51Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-48558", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-48558 Exploitation Attempt - KEV_EXPLOIT"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:3743534; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-29, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

items.title: JSP webshells being dropped on unpatched PTC Windchill instances
items.description: The US Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) added a vulnerability (CVE-2026-12569) in Windchill and FlexPLM, two product lifecycle management software platforms developed by PTC, to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog. items.title: CVE-2026-48558: SimpleHelp Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
items.description: SimpleHelp contains an authentication bypass vulnerability in the OIDC authentication flow. When OIDC authentication is configured, identity tokens submitted during login are accepted without verifying their cryptographic signature. In a vulnerable configuration, a remote, unauthenticated attacker can submit a forged token containing arbitrary identity claims to obtain a fully authenticated technician session. In some configurations, this may also allow bypass of multi-factor authentication. | Vendor: SimpleHelp | Product: SimpleHelp | Action: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISAs BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISAs Forensics Triage Requirements (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adhe

items.title: CVE-2023-0645: libjxl/cjxl out-of-bounds read in EXIF metadata parsing
items.description:
Posted by Alexander A. Shvedov on Jun 29 Product: JPEG XL / libjxl 
Affected: libjxl versions before 0.8.1 
CVE: CVE-2023-0645 
CWE: CWE-125 (Out-of-bounds Read) 
CVSS 3.1: 9.1 CRITICAL (NVD: AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:H) 
CVSS 3.1: 5.3 MEDIUM (CNA/Google: AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N) 
Reporter: sigdevel < https://infosec.exchange/@sigdevel > / Alexander A. Shvedov 
 
Description: 
 An out-of-bounds read exists in libjxl when parsing EXIF metadata.

items.title: CVE-2026-13539: A vulnerability was identified in Wavlink WL-NU516U1-A M16U1_V240425. The impacted element is the function sub_407504 of
items.description: A vulnerability was identified in Wavlink WL-NU516U1-A M16U1_V240425. The impacted element is the function sub_407504 of the file /cgi-bin/wireless.cgi of the component POST Parameter Handler. Such manipulation of the argument Guest_ssid leads to stack-based buffer overflow. The attack can be executed remotely. The exploit is publicly available and might be used. It is suggested to upgrade the affected component. The vendor was contacted early, responded in a very professional manner and quickly released a fixed version of the affected product.

id: a5e4abbe-2e39-5b14-b47f-2d35f828bcb4
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-13539 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: HIGH | Class: GENERIC
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-13539
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/29
modified: 2026/06/29
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: high
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-13539 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-29T21:42:51Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-13539", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-13539 Exploitation Attempt - GENERIC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:8210222; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-29, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.confidence_rationale: High confidence based on: CVSS score 7.2 (High); EPSS score 0.466 (elevated exploitation probability)
items.recommended_sla_action: URGENT PATCH — Critical severity, deploy fix within 72 hours
items._tier_notice: Upgrade to PRO for full enrichment: actor attribution, kill chain, IOC hashes, AI analysis, STIX bundle.

items.title: CVE-2026-13546: A vulnerability was found in Feehi CMS up to 2.1.1. This vulnerability affects unknown code of the file /api/articles of
items.description: A vulnerability was found in Feehi CMS up to 2.1.1. This vulnerability affects unknown code of the file /api/articles of the component REST API Endpoint. Performing a manipulation results in missing authentication. The attack may be initiated remotely. The exploit has been made public and could be used. The project was informed of the problem early through an issue report but has not responded yet.
items.apex_ai_summary: [HIGH] CVE advisory. Risk score 7.3/10. Full APEX AI analysis available to Pro subscribers.
items.ioc_note: Actor-attribution campaign — IOC set derived from threat actor research, not automated feed extraction.

items.title: CVE-2026-13543: A vulnerability was detected in Documenso up to 2.11.0. Affected by this vulnerability is an unknown functionality of th
items.description: A vulnerability was detected in Documenso up to 2.11.0. Affected by this vulnerability is an unknown functionality of the file packages/auth/server/lib/utils/handle-oauth-callback-url.ts of the component Google OAuth Login. The manipulation results in improper authentication. It is possible to launch the attack remotely. This attack is characterized by high complexity. The exploitation appears to be difficult. The exploit is now public and may be used. The pull request to fix this issue awaits acceptance.
